narrative:
Brushcreek (precinct in Highland County) has 815 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
